case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. PRESTON GRESHAM et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION IN SUPPORT: 1. DEFAULT JUDGMENT ( CCP 585) 2. ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS ( CCP 1033) 3. COPIES IN LIEU OF ORIGINALS ( EVID 1550) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $265.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT GRESHAM, PRESTON

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GRESHAM, PRESTON $2,763.66 PRINCIPAL, $265.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,028.66, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT GRESHAM, PRESTON DOES 1 THRU 15, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-16-2009
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC SERVED NOV-11-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GRESHAM, PRESTON
WAIVER OF INTEREST & ATTORNEY'S FEES DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
DECLARATION FOR REIMBURSEMENT OF COSTS ( CCP 1033) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THRU 15, INCL.
